Reduced fares are available for MTA subway, bus, and rail customers who are 65 or older or who have qualifying Find out more about how and if you qualify .

steps.description: [link] Download a PDF short list of accessible stations. -> CLICK
steps.label: Download a PDF short list of accessible stations.
steps.observation:
Download a PDF short list of accessible stations. Continue scrolling for an expanded list including the location of the street elevator(s) or ramp entrance of each station, as

Each of the following stations has ramp and/or elevator access. Additional accessibility features may also be present at these and Stations section for specific accessibility information.

  • (For information about accessibility of stations in New Jersey, call New Jersey Transit at 800-772-2222.)
  • Hoboken* (transfer to PATH, ferries)
  • Secaucus Junction* (in-station transfer for direct service to Penn Station, New York)
  • Penn Station, New York
